highLevelOverview: Refresh the UI to feel calm, consistent, and content-first across Home/Projects, Editor/Toolbar, Search, and Save/Diff. Preserve all existing functionality while improving hierarchy, location awareness (book/chapter), responsiveness, and accessibility. Reduce styling fragmentation by migrating Tailwind usages to a unified Vanilla Extract + Mantine token approach, then removing Tailwind.
goals: Content-first hierarchy: scripture and search results dominate; controls support quietly.
Consistent component styling across routes (buttons, rows, drawers, modals, inputs).
Clear location awareness: user always knows current book/chapter and mode.
Responsive layouts that feel designed on mobile/tablet/desktop.
Accessible focus states and keyboard navigation patterns remain correct.
Eliminate Tailwind dependency after migrating remaining usage.
nonGoals: Adding new domain features or changing core editor behaviors.
Changing parsing, linting, diffing, saving, or project import logic.
technicalConstraints: Preserve functionality exactly as documented in product specs (search, replace, diff/save, import, modes).
Hexagonal architecture: no UI leakage into src/core.
TypeScript strict; maintain current test IDs and existing E2E coverage patterns.
Remove Tailwind only after Tailwind class usage is eliminated; keep migration incremental to avoid massive churn.

tasks.title: Capture baseline UI screenshots
tasks.description: Capture current UI across mobile/tablet/desktop for Home, Project view, Search, Save/Diff, and Dark Mode to compare after each phase.
acceptance: Screenshots exist for at least: home, project, search, save/diff, dark mode (desktop + mobile).
Script can be rerun with a local dev server running.

tasks.title: Add DESIGN_SYSTEM documentation
tasks.description: Create product-docs DESIGN_SYSTEM doc for semantic tokens, component specs, and interaction states to stop styling drift.
acceptance: Defines semantic roles (surfaces/text/borders/interactive states).
Defines typography + spacing scale.
Defines focus ring and accessibility expectations.

tasks.title: Split Home vs New Project routes
tasks.description: Reduce cognitive load by making Home a clean Projects list, and moving Create Project to a dedicated route. Keep import functionality identical.
acceptance: Home route shows projects list as primary content.
A dedicated route contains the existing create/import UI (repo search, folder upload, zip import).
Drawer 'New Project' navigates to the dedicated route.
No changes to import logic, only placement.

tasks.title: Re-group toolbar actions
tasks.description: Reduce clutter by grouping primary actions (Search, Review & Save) and moving secondary actions (Prettify, Match Formatting) to an overflow menu, while preserving access and shortcuts.
acceptance: Toolbar reads left→right: navigation, context (book/chapter), primary actions, secondary actions.
Icon sizes, spacing, and hover/focus states are consistent.
All actions remain reachable on desktop and mobile.

tasks.title: Make book/chapter obvious
tasks.description: Add a persistent, readable book/chapter indicator outside the picker control so users never lose visual focus on where they are.
acceptance: Current book/chapter is legible at a glance on desktop and mobile.
Indicator stays in sync with navigation/picker changes.
Does not change navigation behavior.

tasks.title: Search panel: results-first layout
tasks.description: Make search results the primary object and tuck advanced options away. Reduce heavy chrome and make row interactions consistent (hover, selected, focus).
acceptance: Search header contains primary query control prominently.
Advanced toggles are visually secondary (disclosure/accordion).
Results list has consistent row affordance and keyboard focus.
Mobile drawer layout dedicates more space to results.

tasks.title: Unify hover/focus tokens
tasks.description: Eliminate inconsistent hover states over dark elements by using shared semantic tokens for interactive states.
acceptance: Hover/active/focus styles are consistent on light and dark surfaces.
No ad-hoc darken/lighten calls for common interactive states unless tokenized.

tasks.title: Migrate off Tailwind and remove dependency
tasks.description: Replace remaining Tailwind class usage with Vanilla Extract (or plain CSS where appropriate), then remove Tailwind from Vite plugins and dependencies.
acceptance: No Tailwind utility classes remain in src/app.
Tailwind Vite plugin removed from both Vite configs.
Tailwind deps removed from package.json (tailwindcss, @tailwindcss/vite, tw-animate-css if no longer used).
App renders identically (or better) after removal.

tasks.title: Polish: empty/loading/error states + toasts
tasks.description: Improve empty/searching states, save/diff empty state, and notification placement so it doesn't obscure scripture content.
acceptance: Empty/searching states feel intentional and calm.
Notifications are smaller and placed so they don't cover primary content.
No behavior changes to save/diff logic.
